notes: Attested Clements paradigm: habitual particle 'tï' [tə], central vowel written ⟨ï⟩; no stress assigned (spelling does not recover Korlai stress) (clements_apics; clements1996).
Present-progressive 'tɛ' [tɛ] with open-mid vowel; participle 'katan' with nasal coda (clements_apics; clements1996).
Past-habitual particle 'ti', minimally distinct from present 'tï' — the TMA series is a Clements diagnostic (clements_apics; clementskoontz2002).
Future particle 'lï' [lə] with central vowel ⟨ï⟩ (clements_apics; clements1996).
Attested simple-past negation with preverbal 'nu' and past form 'kato' (clements_apics; clements1996).
Attested: 1sg 'yo' [jo] glide onset; 'tana' 'go'; interrogative 'un' 'where' (clements_apics; clements1996).
Attested animate-object marking with 'ku'; past 'ulyo' 'saw'; /v/ as approximant [ʋ] in 'Lwidz'; ⟨dz⟩=[dz] affricate (clements_apics; clements1996).
Attested inanimate object unmarked (no 'ku'); 'kadz' 'house' with final affricate [dz] (clements_apics; clements1996).
Attested: 'itin' 'yet' + negated present 'nu-tɛ' + participle 'vid' with approximant [ʋ] (clements_apics; clements1996).

gloss_en: A man with a big belly.
notes: Nasal vowel [ɔ̃] in 'ɔ̃m' 'man'; breathy-voiced [bʱ] in 'bharig' 'belly' (⟨bh⟩ digraph); homorganic /nd/ in 'grand' (clements1996).
Aspirated [kʰ] in 'kharm' 'meat' (⟨kh⟩ digraph) — the aspirate/breathy series is a Marathi-contact trait (clements1996; clementskoontz2002).

gloss_en: Do not eat the unripe mango.
notes: Aspirated [tʰ] in 'thɛr' 'unripe'; open-mid [ɛ]; homorganic /ŋɡ/ in 'manga'; preverbal negator 'nu' (clements1996).
Nasal vowels [ĩ] in 'sĩk' 'five' and [ɔ̃] in 'ɔ̃m'/'lɔ̃j'; in 'lɔ̃j' the ambiguous ⟨j⟩ is the glide [j] not [dʒ], per the attested form (clements_apics; clements1996).
'butïk' 'shop' with central vowel [ə] written ⟨ï⟩; approximant [ʋ] in 'vid' 'come' (clements1996).
1pl 'nɔ'; quantifier 'tudu'; habitual 'tï'; ⟨j⟩=[dʒ] and homorganic /nt/ in 'janta' (clements_apics; clements1996).
Breathy [dʱ] in 'dhal' 'lentil' (⟨dh⟩ digraph, Marathi loan) (clements1996; clementskoontz2002).

sentence: Yo lï da bo un livru.
ipa: jo lə da bo un liʋɾu
gloss_en: I will give you a book.
notes: Future 'lï'; double-object 'da bo un livru'; approximant [ʋ] in 'livru' (clements_apics; clements1996).

gloss_en: You cut bread with a knife.
notes: Instrumental 'ki fak' 'with a knife'; 'pãw' 'bread' with nasal vowel [ã] + approximant [ʋ] glide (clements1996).
Retroflex [ʈ] in 'ʈeni' 'have' from Marathi contact; 'kadz' with final [dz]; homorganic /nd/ in 'grand' (clements1996; clementskoontz2002).

sentence: Manga ku ag el tï tan.
ipa: manɡa ku aɡ el tə tan
gloss_en: He brings a mango and water.
notes: Homorganic /ŋɡ/ in 'manga'; 'ag' 'water'; habitual 'tï'; 'tan' 'bring' with nasal coda (clements_apics; clements1996).
